content: We can reframe an ICM-based curious autonomous agent’s intrinsic reward signal as a *tool-based memory operation*, where the agent’s curiosity mechanism acts as a programmable memory editing tool that selectively prunes low-prediction-error trivial memories and expands ambiguous, high-error novel memory traces, rather than treating curiosity as just a reward signal for exploration. This creates a curiosity self-augmenting loop where the agent’s memory structure actively shapes what it finds curious next.
